title: Themed Quiz — Sample
description: One of every question type, plus the new media-on-prompt and media-on-options shapes.

prompt.text: Who is the **Fourth Hokage** of the Hidden Leaf Village?

questions.explanation: Minato Namikaze, the Yellow Flash, served as the Fourth Hokage. He sealed the Nine-Tails into his newborn son Naruto, dying in the process.

prompt.text: Which of the following are members of the **Akatsuki**?

questions.explanation: Itachi, Kisame, Pain, and Konan were all Akatsuki members. Jiraiya was a Sannin and infiltrated Akatsuki only as a spy. Kakashi was never a member.

prompt.text: Place each character in their village or organization.

questions.explanation: Naruto, Sasuke, and Sakura are all genin of Konoha (Team 7). Gaara and Temari are siblings from the Sand Village. Itachi, Pain, and Konan are Akatsuki members.

prompt.text: Order these Hokage from earliest reign to latest.
How many tailed beasts are there in total?

questions.explanation: There are nine tailed beasts, originally split off from the Ten-Tails (Jubi). Numbered One-Tail (Shukaku) through Nine-Tails (Kurama).
Itachi Uchiha massacred the Uchiha clan under orders from Konoha's leadership to prevent a coup, sparing only his younger brother Sasuke.

prompt.text: Listen carefully. Which Naruto: Shippuden OST is playing?

questions.explanation: **Samidare** (early summer rain) — used in many of Shippuden's quieter, somber moments. The four candidates here are all instrumental Shippuden cues; *Saika* is the gentle piano piece, *Hitotsuba Chikara* is more strident, and *Gekiha* is heavier percussion.

prompt.text: **Samidare** is one of the iconic somber Shippuden cues. Tap each clip below — which one is *Samidare*?

questions.explanation: Clip C is **Samidare** — soft strings and gentle piano. The others are *Saika* (delicate piano), *Gekiha* (driving percussion), and *Hitotsuba Chikara* (strident, layered).
